payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current fact. Treat 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current, preserve it only as former employment if retained, and record Sam's current employer as Point72 with no transition date specified.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman.
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to Sam and appears to describe the same person as the existing current employment fact, but no stable entity ID was provided.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Detected an employment transition conflict candidate.
Resolved as temporal supersession rather than simultaneous current employment.
Avoided presenting the superseded Goldman employment as current.

repair_options: Mark the Goldman employment fact as superseded/not current.
Convert the Goldman fact to former employment: Sam formerly worked at Goldman.
Add current employment: Sam works at Point72.
Record the transition without an exact date unless one is provided.
